learning_rate.notes: Most critical parameter for convergence. Log scale covers typical good range for CNNs with AdamW.

batch_size.notes: Powers of 2 are efficient. 32-256 range covers typical good values for CIFAR-10 on small models.

num_conv_layers.notes: Architecture parameter. Baseline is 3, exploring 2-5 to find optimal depth for CIFAR-10.

dropout.notes: Regularization parameter. 0-0.5 range covers no dropout to moderate regularization.

weight_decay.notes: L2 regularization for AdamW. Log scale covers typical effective range.

num_filters.notes: Model capacity parameter. Starting with moderate range around likely baseline of 64 filters.

changelog.description: Initial search space: learning_rate, batch_size, num_conv_layers, dropout, weight_decay, num_filters
